openFindings.title: A worker crash permanently strands a vector job in running
openFindings.description: A process exit after claim leaves the vector job permanently unselectable in normal operation.
openFindings.scopeProof: Exact search across _db/_engine found the only running claim and no stale-running recovery; only explicit rebuildVectorProjection resets jobs.

openFindings.title: The generation pointer accepts a symlinked database outside its publication directory
openFindings.description: A basename-only pointer can resolve through a symlink outside the generation directory and its declared generationHash is not bound to the opened database.
openFindings.scopeProof: The single pointer resolver feeds persistent query and hydration; writer-side staging/rollback validation exists, but exact search and schema tests found no reader-side realpath containment, hash binding, or pointer-symlink test.

openFindings.title: Persistent queries ignore an explicitly requested generation
openFindings.description: The persistent query path silently substitutes the current generation for a caller-supplied generationHash.
openFindings.scopeProof: Generation pin enforcement exists for cursors and hydration but not direct persistent queries.

openFindings.title: Persistent retrieval accepts arbitrarily large query vectors
openFindings.description: The synchronous persistent query path accepts and duplicates an unbounded caller-controlled queryVector.
openFindings.scopeProof: Query-vector validation checks finite/non-empty values only; the embedder-output cap does not protect query inputs.

openFindings.title: Phase 001 marks a ten-iteration research task complete after only seven iterations
openFindings.description: Phase 001 marks a ten-iteration research task complete even though the authoritative handoff records only seven iterations and current strict validation fails.
openFindings.scopeProof: Spec, tasks, checklist, synthesis, handoff, and parent map were reconciled; only checked completion evidence asserts ten executed iterations.

openFindings.title: Phase 002 checks both research lineages complete although GLM produced zero iterations
openFindings.description: Phase 002 marks both SOL and GLM lineages complete and converged although GLM produced zero iterations and the synthesis is SOL-only.
openFindings.scopeProof: Spec, tasks, checklist, SOL synthesis, handoff, and parent map agree on SOL=20/GLM=0 except checked completion rows.

openFindings.title: Phase 003 claims a corpus-scale SLO was measured from a 20-style fixture
openFindings.description: Phase 003 marks the corpus-scale persistent-query SLO measured and proven although its test fixture contains only twenty styles and the handoff defers the full-corpus check.
openFindings.scopeProof: REQ-007, tasks, checklist, the sole timing test, and handoff limitations were traced; no 1,290-style persistent benchmark exists.

openFindings.title: The parent declares the four-phase program complete and verified while required evidence is false
openFindings.description: The parent declares all four phases complete and verified despite false checked research/SLO evidence, active required defects, and a failing current recursive strict validation.
openFindings.scopeProof: Parent handoff criteria were reconciled against all four child matrices, current tests/checkers, strict validation, and the corrected active baseline.

openFindings.title: Persistent DB maintenance has no owned operator surface or bounded generation-retention path
openFindings.description: Full builds retain uniquely named immutable generations, while publication, rollback, vector repair, and queue drain are library-only with no production operator owner or prune policy.
openFindings.scopeProof: Exact search found the maintenance exports consumed only internally or by tests; CLI has legacy build/query/hydrate only and generation deletion targets temporary/building paths.

openFindings.title: The aggregate hash includes the mutable slug locator
openFindings.description: Artifact relativePath includes slug and is hashed despite the research contract requiring style-relative paths, so locator-only renames rotate generation identity.
openFindings.scopeProof: The single aggregate-hash producer and artifact path producer were traced; retrieval hash remains separate.

resolvedFindings.title: Persistent queries ignore an explicitly requested generation
resolvedFindings.description: The persistent query silently substitutes current generation for caller-supplied generationHash.
resolvedFindings.scopeProof: Exact search found requested-generation enforcement only in hydration and cursor handling; no query test supplies generationHash.

resolvedFindings.title: Summary P1 finding 3
resolvedFindings.description: security — SQLite/file trust boundaries, generation pointer validation, corpus and hydration containment, hostile query/vector inputs, exemplar trust, mutation boundaries, and alias recursion

resolvedFindings.title: Summary P1 finding 4
resolvedFindings.description: security — SQLite/file trust boundaries, generation pointer validation, corpus and hydration containment, hostile query/vector inputs, exemplar trust, mutation boundaries, and alias recursion

resolvedFindings.title: Summary P2 finding 1
resolvedFindings.description: security — SQLite/file trust boundaries, generation pointer validation, corpus and hydration containment, hostile query/vector inputs, exemplar trust, mutation boundaries, and alias recursion

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The tested transaction boundary preserves prior generation and hashes.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Direct code and failure-injection evidence agree.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: Implementation and focused regression evidence agree.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: No contradictory path was found within the declared retrieval surface.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: Direct guards and adversarial tests agree.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: No contradictory static path was found in the declared corpus/hydration surfaces.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: No phase-004 registration or alias drift was found.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Direct registration evidence and current tests agree with no contradictory route.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: No materially duplicated shared authority was found.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Central authority and thin-router boundary are explicit.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: No distinct fixture-maintenance defect was established.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: A new finding would duplicate the active SLO evidence finding.

results.summary: Two security trust/input boundaries fail closed-contract comparison.

evidence: focused probes: pointer symlink and oversized vector accepted
results.summary: Hydration, rights, mutation, and alias claims checked; pointer/vector gaps remain and the full matrix is deferred to traceability.
